title: Diastolic blood pressure (cigarette smoking interaction) association near LINC01957 - TRIM36
technicalName: rs10077885 Diastolic blood pressure (cigarette smoking interaction)
summary: GWAS Catalog links rs10077885 with Diastolic blood pressure (cigarette smoking interaction).
detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=2e-17. Initial sample: 80,552 European ancestry individuals, 27,118 African individuals, 13,438 Asian individuals, 8,805 Hispanic individuals. Replication sample: 305,513 European ancestry individuals, 7,786 African individuals, 148,932 Asian individuals, 13,533 Hispanic individuals, 4,414 Brazilian individuals.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.
gwasInitialSampleSize: 80,552 European ancestry individuals, 27,118 African individuals, 13,438 Asian individuals, 8,805 Hispanic individuals
